resources.string: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
I have read and agree to the
Enter your email and we\'ll send you a reset link
If this email is registered, you will receive a reset link
A verification code has been sent to %1$s
Password must be at least 8 characters
Password must be no more than 128 characters
Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
Password must contain at least one number
Please agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
This account is no longer available.
Please verify your email before signing in.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Not signed in. Please sign in first.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
No instructor profile found. Complete instructor registration first.
You have already unlocked this request
This request has reached the instructor quota
This request can no longer be unlocked
You will need to log in again to use the app.
Are you sure you want to leave?
Your progress will not be saved.
Select the resorts you plan to visit (multi-select)
Not sure yet? No worries — discuss with your instructor
Choose your activity and number of participants
For groups, select the lowest skill level in your group
Can do basic snowplow / pizza stop
Can make parallel turns on intermediate runs
Comfortable on most terrain and powder
Can do falling leaf, basic stops
Can link turns on intermediate runs
Comfortable on most terrain, jumps, and powder
Choose when you\'d like your lesson
Choose how many days you\'d like
All fields below are optional — feel free to skip
Anything else you\'d like the instructor to know?
e.g., Would like photos taken during the lesson, special requirements, etc.
Instructors will see your request shortly. Stay tuned for notifications.
Post your first lesson request to find your ski instructor
Once ended, this request will no longer be visible to instructors. Existing conversations will remain accessible.
You haven\'t contacted any instructors yet
No recommended instructors at the moment
Click to change avatar (JPG/PNG, max 10 MB)
Image too large. Please choose a file under 10 MB.
Failed to save. Please try again.
Have a question or feedback? We\'d love to hear from you.
Describe your question or feedback (at least 10 characters)
Please enter a valid email address
Message must be at least 10 characters
Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
Full content is available on the TeachMeSki website.
Unlocking this request will cost %1$d credits
You don\'t have enough credits to complete this unlock.
Your first message to the student
Add your teaching style, experience, or certifications here
Tip: A personalized first message significantly increases your conversion rate.
Browse lesson requests to find students who need your instruction
Transaction records will appear here after you unlock lesson requests
Verify your phone number to earn a verified badge and build student trust.
Supports Taiwan (09 prefix) and Japan (080/090 prefix)
Code sent to %1$s. Valid for 10 minutes.
Invalid phone number format. Please try again.
Only Taiwan (+886) and Japan (+81) numbers are supported.
This phone number is already linked to another account.
Invalid or expired code. Please request a new one.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Go to Account Settings to verify your phone number.
Are you sure you want to delete this certificate image? This action cannot be undone.
Create an account to complete instructor registration
We sent a verification code to %1$s
Your progress will not be saved.
Select the disciplines you teach (multiple OK)
Select the levels you can teach (multiple OK)
Can do a basic snowplow (pizza) stop
Can parallel turn, comfortable on intermediate runs
Can handle most terrain and powder
Can link turns, comfortable on intermediate runs
Can handle most terrain, jumps, and powder
Expert — carving, park, powder, steep terrain
Select the resorts where you provide lessons (multiple OK)
Enter the name students will see
Name must be 50 characters or fewer
e.g., 5 years of teaching experience, specializing in building confidence for beginners. Patient and adaptive teaching style.
Bio must be 2,000 characters or fewer
This appears on your instructor profile to help students get to know you
Select the languages you can teach in (multiple OK)
This price will be displayed on your instructor page
Full-day price is lower than half-day price
What extra services do you offer? (optional)
Pickup between accommodation and the resort
Photos or video during the lesson
One email is all you need to start your instructor journey
Choose a strong password for your account
Enter your password to continue instructor registration
At least 8 characters with upper, lower, and a number
I have read and agree to the Terms of Service
I have read and agree to the
Already have an account? Sign in
Password must be at least 8 characters
Password must include an uppercase letter
Password must include a lowercase letter
Please agree to the Terms of Service
Something went wrong. Please try again later.
This account has not completed email verification
A code will be sent to %1$s
Send limit reached. Please try again later.
Too many attempts. Try again after %1$s.
Could not send. Please try again later.
We\'ve prepared 500 credits as a welcome gift
Something went wrong. Please try again later.
You have already reviewed this instructor
Failed to send. Please try again.
Details will appear here in a later update
Unlock actions will appear here in a later update
Send a message first to review
Unlock to chat with the student
Failed to send. Please try again.
No instructors have contacted you yet
You haven\'t contacted any instructors yet
This instructor is not accepting new lesson requests
Can do a basic snowplow (pizza) stop
Can parallel turn, comfortable on intermediate runs
Can handle most terrain and powder
Can link turns, comfortable on intermediate runs
Can handle most terrain, jumps, and powder
Expert — carving, park, powder, steep terrain
Something went wrong. Please try again.
